## Attendance System - Project Setup Checklist

### Project Type: React Web Application with TypeScript

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Project type: React Web Application
	- Language: TypeScript
	- Build tool: Vite

- [ ] Scaffold the Project
	- Set up React + TypeScript project structure
	- Create folder structure for components, pages, services, and utilities
	- Configure build and development environment

- [ ] Customize the Project
	- Set up project structure and initial components
	- Configure any necessary dependencies

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
	- Install recommended VS Code extensions for React development

- [ ] Compile the Project
	- Install all dependencies
	- Verify build configuration

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	- Set up development server task

- [ ] Launch the Project
	- Start development server

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- Verify README.md exists and is current
	- Clean up this checklist

## Project Structure
```
Attendance_System/
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   ├── pages/
│   ├── services/
│   ├── utils/
│   ├── App.tsx
│   └── main.tsx
├── public/
├── package.json
├── vite.config.ts
└── tsconfig.json
```
